feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Review booklet tab does not appear on manage kpis and reports app
entry.content:
I would like to create a review booklet according to this blog. However, I do not see a "Review boolket" button above the screen next to "stories". How can I make it appear? Thank you.

Review Booklet Designer (Concept and Adaptability)... - SAP Community

product name: SAP S/4HANA CLOULD 2408

entry.title: how to create a Custom API in S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello Team,

The requirement is to create a single API that handles posting of for eg: sales orders, deliveries, and goods issues from an external system. While there are standard APIs available for each business process, the client prefers a unified API that executes all these processes synchronously and returns a confirmation.

My question is, how can I create such an API in the S/4HANA Cloud Public system? I have come across blogs discussing the conversion of custom business objects into APIs, but I do not want anything to be stored in a business object. Could you please suggest a solution I can follow?

Regards,
Shankar G

entry.title: External tax engine Mapping Tag
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

We're facing a problem with external engine tax calculation, where the provider says that we need to send the following tags, but we didn't find where these values come from.

"amountCalcType": "gross",

"subjectToPayrollTaxRelief": true, 

"enableCprb": true,

"withLaborAssignment": true

Please, someone knows where we can set these parameters?

We are localized in Brazil.

Best Regards,

Fabio

entry.title: Schedule background job in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a quick question and need a confirmation on same.

I am working on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud System 3 tier landscape. I want to know if there is a way to directly schedule an object as a Scheduled Job like we did in SM36 in 0n-Premise system. 

For Example, I have created a class via Developer Extensibility and now I want to run that class daily and send lets say an email based on some condition or Update some sales orders based on some condition via EML. Is it possible via S4 Application jobs or we have to go via Integration Suite???

I have already checked blog How to schedule application jobs from a RAP-based ... - SAP Community but in this methodology we need a RAP application and user have to trigger it everytime to run the code in background. Also, I know about the SAP BTP Job Scheduling Service but I am looking for a process without BTP service.

Regards,

Aman Mittal

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility ABAP Cloud

entry.title: Cannot deploy Fiori Element app to S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi
I'm trying to deploy the Fiori Element application to S/4 Hana Cloud Public Edition
but the deploy cmd failed with the message "You are not authorized to create"

this is my ui5-deploy.yaml and btp destination

*BTP Destination is connected to client Development (080) 

I would like to know What role or authorized objects are required to deploy Fiori App and where to set it.

entry.title: Barcode Scanning function using ABAP
entry.content:
I would like to know can we create barcode scanning action using ABAP in eclipse ADT.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: can someone explain FSD in SAP ? what is role of fsd in reporting ? How it is helpful in HCM module?
Public Cloud - CDS Development - Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are implementing SAP Public Cloud and have some requirements that has to be addressed by custom development. There are few questions in using CDS Views in SAP Public Cloud Only and use the view in SAC Live and Data Acquisition models?

1. Can I use Eclipse IDE for creating CDS views? SAP Note: 3016104 suggests it cannot be used?

2. Is it necessary to have COMPOSITE and CONSUMPTION views and associated annotations like @analytics.category: #CUBE and @analytics.query: TRUE - Any restrictions?

2. Once the CDS is created using Eclipse, what is the Binding Type to be used? InA-UI, OData V2 Web API?

3. Are there any step by step process?

Thank you,

Arthur.

entry.title: Public Cloud - CDS - SAC - Authorization Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to extract data both in Live and Data Acquisition mode for my SAC Report. It is a public Cloud edition and the extraction I need have specific needs so I chose eclipse to build the CDS (CDS Name is ZTEST). Data preview is good. So

STEPS I FOLLOWED:

1. Create a CDS View ZTEST ( it calls I_GLAccountLineItem) it has certain authorization objects (Not sure whther these authorization automatically extends to the calling CDS ZTEST) 

2.  I created a Service Definition to my newly created CDS View (ZTEST_SERVICE).

3. I created two different Service Bindings. One with InA - UI and OData V2 - Web API (2 Bindings)

4. OData V2 - Web API created a Service URL (/sap/opu/odata/ZTEST) and an Entity Set and Association as ZTEST.

- OData Service URL with full path extracts data in the browser (I think this as a minimum guarentee to bring data to SAC) 

- When I try to create a Data Acquisition model it showed the query, let me Build Odata Service Query and when I try to create the query , I got an error 

The user does not have permission to access the requested resource.
Correlation ID: 30444370-1995-4409-9954-495703651595
(May be this is very specific to the user not having access to the underlying CDS Access? Not sure)
5. InA - UI created a familiar External Service name with 2CZTEST

   Live Data Model attepmpt - External Service name 2CZTEST shows up and upon selection it flashes the key figure value (model is still building) and throws an error:   

Server Error: Error [Server]: You do not have start authorization for R3TR INA1 ZTEST_DDL2_INA_BINDING, return code 4.
Correlation ID: 40361062-2532-4327-9467-617666356051
 
Appreciate all the help I can get.
 
Thank you,
Arthur.

entry.title: Adding a tab in manage cost center app using UI Adaptation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have one requirement to add a tab in "Manage cost center"  app, and under that tab to add few fields.

While am trying to add a tab using UI Adaptation, am getting below error.

If anyone has faced similar challenges, let me know. And Please help if you have implemented these changes in your project.

Thanks.

Regards,

Jagadhatri

ABAP Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition

entry.title: Issue with Data Types: Batch Load Data into a Custom Business Object in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I referred below Blog to upload data into Custom Business Object using EXCEL.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/batch-load-data-into-a-custom-business-object-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud/ba-p/13359205

Everything was working great except if custom business objects has any field with data types Quantity/Amount is not working while uploading data through excel.

@MartyMcCormick

API NW ABAP Gateway (OData)

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: I would like to know data creation for this api "FAA_FIXED_ASSET_CREATE_MAIN_WEBI"in s4hana system.
entry.content:
When I create data for Fixed Asset of this api "FAA_FIXED_ASSET_CREATE_MAIN_WEBI" by using soap in s4hana system with required field as documentation, it is not ok and there is no sample payload for this api in documentation.

So, I would like to know data creation for this api "FAA_FIXED_ASSET_CREATE_MAIN_WEBI" by using soap in s4hana system. If there is any payload, please let me know.

Best regards,

Poe

entry.title: Change the value in header level based on item level supplier value in outgoing payments tile
entry.content:
I want to change / substitute the the header level reference field based on the supplier account which is in item level. FIN_CODING_BLOCK_SUBSTITUTION is for item level substitution only. Then how it is possible to change the header value based on item level field value ?.. .pls give me a solution.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: #Coe#BUMA Custom Logic BAdI / Extensibility for Service Performer in Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a BAdI or custom logic extensibility for Service Performer in Purchase Requisition? Currently, Service Performer is only available in MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM for Purchase Order.

Thank you,

Jen

entry.title: #COE#BUMA MMPUR_PR_PROFNL_ITM_CTF not available in extension points upon creating custom logic
entry.content:
Hi,

Upon creating custom logic with extension point MMPUR_PR_PROFNL_ITM_CTF in S/4HC Public Cloud, there is no data available and no result showing. In 2308 upgrade it is one of the newly introduced custom logic extensibility for PR. Any idea why it is not available now?

Thanks,

Jen

entry.title: How to set value help for application job parameters
entry.content:
How can we set value help ​​for parameters in an application job?

We are currently investigating how to develop using Developer Extensibility on S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

The help below instructs us to use IF_APJ_RT_VALUE_HELP_EXIT, but when I tried this, it did not work.

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/editing-application-job-catalogs?locale=en-US

entry.title: Is there an Internal Order field available in S4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Solved: Internal order in S4HANA Public Cloud 3SL - SAP Community

The above thread seems to suggest that Internal orders are available in Public Cloud just without the same variations that there were in the past. 

Is this indeed the case and if so can I please be provided with some config specs on said field?

entry.title: Display a List and Allow Form Printing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am new to developing applications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I am seeking guidance on how to create an app in the public version. My goal is to develop an application that:

  • Displays a list of products based on specific logic.
  • Includes a button that allows printing a form for those products.

Could you help me with advice or resources on how to get started with this? Any guide, tutorial, or example would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you very much in advance for your support!

entry.title: Unable to extend E_JournalEntryItem with association
entry.content:
To be able to add custom fields to the I_JournalEntryItem CDS view, we're given the E_JournalEntryItem view entity. However in our case I need to extend it with a new association. I thought this would be simple enough, but but setting up the correct link to the custom CDS will not work.

 

I have a custom CDS view, which needs to be linked to every JournalEntryItem. The logical link would then of course be the AccountingDocument. It is part of the E_JournalEntryItem entity... but not permitted. These key fields are used to uniquely link it to a I_JournalEntryItem record.

define view entity E_JournalEntryItem
  as select from acdoca as Persistence
{
  key Persistence.rldnr  as SourceLedger,
  key Persistence.rbukrs as CompanyCode,
  key Persistence.gjahr  as FiscalYear,
  key Persistence.belnr  as AccountingDocument,
  key Persistence.docln  as LedgerGLLineItem
}

Tried to link it using the Persistence.belnr field as an alternative, but no go.

And of course simply naming it AccountingDocument does not work either, it has to be a full qualified expression.

That leaves be out of ideas. How can I extend the I_JournalEntryItem with a new association based on AccountingDocument?

Using the 'Custom Fields' app does not give me enough flexibility in populating the value, so that's not a viable alternative.

entry.title: RPA/Bots: Are they really different from....?
entry.content:
Hello All,

Here, I am discussing specifically about the use-case of employing a RPA/Bot to read from a file and populate data into S/4, because a released API for that functionality isn't available.

Are they upgrade safe? I don't think so. SAP can change the screens on the app, make a field mandatory on the app or deprecate app with the next version upgrade and then the Bot won't work, isn't it?

So, why is Bot still being considered as an approach this scenario? ABAPers were taught, using BDC is bad practice, because of these same reasons. Bot is doing the exact same thing, yet it is considered an OK choice? Why?

With these same above mentioned risks, I could build a Google Chrome Browser Extension, to directly call the Service/API, that the Fiori page is using and upload the data much-much quicker than the time it would take Bot to traverse through the screens and populate data into S/4. Why is this not a more popular choice?

RPA/Bots in this use-case, are they really any different from BDC?

Thanks
